statement: In every magma, Equation 502 (`x = y * (y * (x * (x * z)))`) implies Equation 273 (`x = ((y * x) * y) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0263
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op y (op x (op x z))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y x) y) x)
